text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: [0] 这是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: Controlling a device with your mind. Powering your home with the energy of your own activities.
zh: [1] 用意念控制设备。用你自己的活动产生的能量为家庭供电。

text: These are two of the developments that experts at IBM think will become reality
zh: [2] 这是IBM专家认为将在未来五年内成为现实的两项发展。

text: within the the next five years. The technology company has
zh: [3] 这家科技公司刚刚发布了其最新的“五年五大预测”报告。

text: released its latest five -in -five report.
zh: [4] 这家科技公司刚刚发布了其最新的“五年五大预测”报告。

text: The experts think people will soon be able to control many electronic devices
zh: [5] 专家们认为,人们很快就能仅凭意念来控制许多电子设备。

text: simply by using their minds. Scientists at IBM and other companies
zh: [6] IBM和其他公司的科学家正在生物信息学这一科学领域研究实现这一目标的方法。

text: are researching ways to do this in a field of science known as bioinformatics.
zh: [7] IBM和其他公司的科学家正在生物信息学这一科学领域研究实现这一目标的方法。

text: They say people will soon have a way
zh: [8] 他们说,人们很快就能只凭想着打电话或发邮件给某人,就能让这件事发生。

text: to just think about calling or emailing someone in order to make it happen.
zh: [9] 他们说,人们很快就能只凭想着打电话或发邮件给某人,就能让这件事发生。

text: Bernie Meyerson is IBM's Vice President of Innovation.
zh: [10] 伯尼·迈耶森是IBM的创新副总裁。

text: He says the idea is for something with really deep capability so that a person
zh: [11] 他说,这个想法是为了实现真正深层次的能力,让一个人

text: for instance a quadriplegic a paraplegic can actually utilize brainwaves
zh: [12] 比如四肢瘫痪或截瘫的人,能够真正利用脑电波

text: to make things happen and basically run their own lives independently
zh: [13] 让事情发生,并基本上独立地掌控自己的生活。

text: another prediction is a way for people to power their homes and offices
zh: [14] 另一项预测是,人们将能利用步行或跑步等活动产生的能量,为家庭和办公室供电。

text: using energy from from activities like walking or running.
zh: [15] 另一项预测是,人们将能利用步行或跑步等活动产生的能量,为家庭和办公室供电。

text: Still another prediction, passwords could soon become a thing of the past.
zh: [16] 还有一项预测是,密码可能很快就会成为过去式。

text: IBM says developments in biometric technology could soon make passwords
zh: [17] IBM说,生物识别技术的发展可能很快会让密码变得不再必要。

text: unnecessary. Some of the most common biometrics used to identify people
zh: [18] IBM说,生物识别技术的发展可能很快会让密码变得不再必要。

text: are fingerprints, face and voice recognition, and iris scans.
zh: [19] 一些最常用于身份识别的生物特征包括指纹、人脸和语音识别,以及虹膜扫描。

text: The iris is the colored part of the eye.
zh: [20] 虹膜是眼睛中带颜色的部分。

text: Bernie Meyerson says this technology will soon be more widely used by money machines
zh: [21] 伯尼·迈耶森说,这项技术很快将被更广泛地应用于自动取款机和其他设备。

text: and other devices. Another prediction from the experts at International Business Machines,
zh: [22] 国际商业机器公司(IBM)专家的另一项预测,

text: means better technology to prevent unwanted email.
zh: [23] 是指能更好地防止垃圾邮件的技术。

text: The fifth prediction on IBM's 5 in 5 list
zh: [24] IBM“五年五大预测”清单上的第五项预测,

text: is an end to the digital divide
zh: [25] 是拥有技术的人与没有技术的人之间的数字鸿沟将被消除。

text: between those who have technology and those who do not.
zh: [26] 是拥有技术的人与没有技术的人之间的数字鸿沟将被消除。

text: Bernie Meyerson says, says, we anticipate within five years
zh: [27] 伯尼·迈耶森说,我们预计在五年之内,

text: better than 80 % coverage of the world's population by cellular to smart phones.
zh: [28] 全球人口中通过蜂窝网络使用智能手机的覆盖率将超过80%。

text: At that point, imagine having, for instance,
zh: [29] 到那时,试想一下,比如说,

text: the ability to speak openly with anybody,
zh: [30] 能够与任何人、

text: anywhere, anytime, and any language. Real -time translation.
zh: [31] 在任何地方、任何时间、用任何语言坦诚交流——实时翻译。

text: Literally, the old Star Trek idea of the universal translator coming to be
zh: [32] 这几乎就是《星际迷航》里通用翻译器的老创意变成现实,

text: and how the world would change if there were that kind of communication and openness.
zh: [33] 以及如果有这种交流和开放性,世界将会如何改变。

text: that's the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: [34] 以上就是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Carolyn Presutti.
zh: [35] 我是卡罗琳·普雷苏蒂,这里是美国之音特别英语节目。
